Process and summary: Legal Nonconformance Risks
No legal non-conformance risks are identified.

The validated initial audit of Winbond Fab 6 evaluates the facility's Labor, Ethics, Occupational Health and Safety and
Environmental practices, and supply chain management systems against the RBA Audit criteria as contained in the RBA Audit
Protocol 8.0 and applicable laws and regulations. The validated initial audit takes place on 7-8 October 2024. Two RBA auditors
spend a total of 4 person days for onsite audit. It is a full scope audit of all manufacturing buildings and common areas. No
integrity issue is encountered during the audit. The audit findings are based on objective evidence gathered through management,
staff and worker interviews, pertinent documents and workplace observations. No non-conformance is found during the audit.
